subcodes.first_line: O ye two stars, like unto the twin luminaries of the Great Bear! Praise be to God that ye shine bright in the horizon of the love of God and at the threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ستاره مانند فرقدان حمد خدا را که در افق محبت الله روشنید و در عتبه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
